---
title: "Project Proposal"
author: "Team"
date: "last-modified"
toc: true
---

# Motivation

State the real-world problem that motivates this project. Avoid saying the
project was assigned. Frame it around the embargo breach scenario and why an
investigator would need a tool to understand what happened.

# Objectives

List what the application will let a user do. For example, trace the sequence of
a breach, compare normal behaviour to a crisis, and surface earlier warning
signs, all through interactive controls rather than fixed charts.

# Data

Describe the VAST Challenge 2026 Mini-Challenge 1 dataset. Number of rounds,
messages, agents, the time span, and the structure of the JSON.

# Methodology

Explain how the data flows from raw JSON to interactive app. A flow diagram
goes here. The three methodology pages cover preparation, analysis, and
visualisation in detail.

# Prototype and Storyboard

Sketch the planned Shiny app layout. Show the main inputs the user controls and
the outputs that update. Hand sketches or simple wireframes are fine.

# R Packages

List the packages the project will use, grouped by purpose such as utility,
plotting, network analysis, and Shiny.

# Project Schedule

A Gantt chart of the timeline from proposal to final submission goes here.
